/usr/bin/arm-none-eabi-gcc -mcpu=cortex-m3 -mthumb -g3 -O0 -Wall -ffunction-sections -fdata-sections -g -mcpu=cortex-m3 -mthumb -Wl,--gc-sections --specs=rdimon.specs -T/home/ridan/Programming/Projects/MBridge/scripts/mps2_m3.ld CMakeFiles/freertos_mps2.elf.dir/home/ridan/Programming/FreeRTOS/FreeRTOS/Source/tasks.c.obj CMakeFiles/freertos_mps2.elf.dir/home/ridan/Programming/FreeRTOS/FreeRTOS/Source/queue.c.obj CMakeFiles/freertos_mps2.elf.dir/home/ridan/Programming/FreeRTOS/FreeRTOS/Source/list.c.obj CMakeFiles/freertos_mps2.elf.dir/home/ridan/Programming/FreeRTOS/FreeRTOS/Source/timers.c.obj CMakeFiles/freertos_mps2.elf.dir/home/ridan/Programming/FreeRTOS/FreeRTOS/Source/portable/MemMang/heap_4.c.obj CMakeFiles/freertos_mps2.elf.dir/home/ridan/Programming/FreeRTOS/FreeRTOS/Source/portable/GCC/ARM_CM3/port.c.obj CMakeFiles/freertos_mps2.elf.dir/src/main.c.obj CMakeFiles/freertos_mps2.elf.dir/src/rtos_tasks.c.obj CMakeFiles/freertos_mps2.elf.dir/src/app_hal_sim.c.obj CMakeFiles/freertos_mps2.elf.dir/src/startup.c.obj -o freertos_mps2.elf
